What do you pledge today? 

(PS: I promise to check on you every 2 months)

artifacts.title: Something receipt from 2024-02-22
artifacts.excerpt:
When starting something, don’t go ALL IN on it! Go with the feeling that you’re exploring. Test it out. See how you feel. And then take baby steps!

Avoids you of calling yourself a quitter if you didn’t like it. So liberating! 🌼
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: something, spoilers, over, aired.

artifacts.title: Something receipt from 2019-07-08
artifacts.excerpt: (1/2) To do something, you have to give it a priority. You have to plan and schedule for it. Having too much on the plate is one of the biggest reasons for me to having end up doing a lot but still no good results. So just go home, plan the things you are planning to do. ....
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: something, spoilers, over, aired.

artifacts.title: Something receipt from 2024-09-14
artifacts.excerpt:
1. something happens
2. get past your "first" emotional reaction (hardest step)
3. consider other ways of looking at it
4. pick one that feels empowering / useful 
5. this shapes how you feel and what you'll do
